data.title: A newly created wallet withdrew 146,000 AUCTION from Binance 1 hour ago, equivalent to about 3.71 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to The Data Nerd's monitoring, one hour ago, a newly created wallet withdrew 146,000 DOGE from Binance, equivalent to approximately US$3.71 million.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Sees Mixed Performance with MANA and RAY Leading Gains and Losses
data.description:
According to PANews, the cryptocurrency market experienced varied movements on March 14, 2025. Leading the gains, MANA is currently priced at $0.272, marking a 2.91% increase. TIA follows with a price of $3.665, up by 2.75%. FET is trading at $0.501, showing a 2.24% rise, while AR is at $6.123, increasing by 2.22%. NEAR rounds out the top gainers with a price of $2.604, up by 1.96%.

Conversely, RAY leads the losses, currently priced at $1.511, reflecting a 4.25% decrease. AAVE is trading at $164.28, down by 2.87%. W has fallen to $0.0848, a decrease of 2.19%. OM is priced at $6.300, down by 1.82%, and NOT is at $0.00204, showing a 1.54% decline. These fluctuations highlight the dynamic nature of the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: High Net Worth Americans Increasingly Invest in Cryptocurrency, Survey Reveals
data.description:
According to PANews, a recent survey conducted by Grayscale Investments and Harris Poll indicates that 26% of American high net worth individuals, defined as those with over $1 million in investable assets, hold cryptocurrency. This figure surpasses the national average of 20%. Furthermore, 38% of these affluent investors anticipate incorporating crypto assets into their future portfolios, with 53% of those under 50 years old and 22% of those over 50 expressing this expectation.

The survey highlights that high net worth investors are increasingly influenced by factors such as the approval of spot Bitcoin ETFs, inflation, and geopolitical events, leading to heightened interest in the crypto market. Notably, 36% of these investors are closely monitoring Bitcoin. Additionally, 42% of high net worth individuals have acquired crypto assets based on recommendations from financial advisors, significantly higher than the 27% of average investors who have done the same.

Moreover, the survey reveals that 43% of investors over 50 and 48% of those under 50 are waiting for clearer regulatory policies before further engaging in the crypto market.

data.title: Do Kwon's Million-Dollar Bet on LUNA's Future Value
data.description: According to Foresight News, on this day in 2022, Do Kwon engaged in a million-dollar wager with crypto influencer Sensei Algod regarding the future value of LUNA. The bet centered on whether LUNA would surpass $88 within a year. Cobie was invited to act as a witness to the agreement.

US Court Approves 3AC's Bid to Expand $1.5B Claim Against FTX
data.description:
The ruling allows 3AC’s liquidators to pursue a much larger recovery from FTX’s bankruptcy estate, adding to the complexity of existing claims.
source: https://decrypt.co/309971/us-court-approves-3acs-bid-to-expand-1-5b-claim-against-ftx

data.title: US court approves Three Arrows Capital’s $1.53 billion claim against FTX
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News The U.S. Bankruptcy Court has approved the liquidators of the hedge fund Three Arrows Capital (3AC) to expand their claims against FTX to $1.53 billion, rejecting the objections of FTX debtors who believe that the move is untimely and unfair.
Earlier news, in November 2024, the liquidators of Three Arrows Capital sought to modify their claims against FTX, increasing their claims from $120 million to $1.53 billion. The liquidators claimed that two weeks before the collapse of the hedge fund, FTX liquidated and seized their assets on the platform to pay off $1.33 billion in debt. The hedge fund claimed that these transactions were "avoidable and unfair" and caused damage to Three Arrows Capital creditors. Three Arrows Capital believes that the liquidation should be invalid, accusing FTX of underestimating transactions and violating trust and contracts.

data.title: Farcaster founder: We will cooperate with projects that want to provide airdrops to users, and the first airdrop will be carried out next week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Farcaster founder Dan Romero said that Farcaster will cooperate with developers/projects that want to provide airdrops to users. After joining, users can perform the required actions (using the framework, participating in channels, etc.) and establish a good user reputation to obtain airdrops in the future. Ultimately, developers can decide the target users (the data is permissionless), and the first airdrop will be carried out next week. Dan Romero added that it should be made clear that the airdrop comes from the framework built by the ecosystem developers (not Farcaster).

data.title: Viewpoint: The current situation of ETH is similar to that in 2019. The Fed needs to change its policy before the ETH/BTC exchange rate can bottom out and rebound.
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Into The Cryptoverse founder Benjamin Cowen said that the current situation of ETH is similar to that in 2019, and changes in the Fed's monetary policy may be needed to make the ETH/BTC exchange rate bottom out and rebound.
In addition, the price of ETH fell below its support level in 2019, just before the Fed ended its quantitative tightening policy. People feel that it is very difficult to make money in this cycle because the monetary policy of this cycle has not changed. In the previous cycle, the market witnessed a shift in monetary policy a year before the halving. At this stage, it is a year after the halving, but the quantitative tightening policy has not changed. The Fed has only slightly reduced its scale and slowed down its pace, but it has never really stopped.
